gloss_en: How are you today? Hope you are well.
notes: pan-Gulf šlon 'how' + zēn 'good'; the node surfaces rank-1 ē monophthong (al-yōm) — Gulf ay/aw→eː/oː (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Today it is very hot and the humidity is high.
notes: pan-Gulf wāyid 'very'; sun assimilation ar-r written; geminate رّ

gloss_en: I don't want coffee, I want tea.
notes: pan-Gulf abī 'I want'; ق→ɡ (gahwa) and چ→tʃ affrication are node rank-1 reflexes (alshammari2026; szreder_derrick2023)

sentence: اِشْتَرَيت ثَلَاث سِمْچَات مِن السُّوق بِخَمْسِين.
raw: اشتريت ثلاث سمچات من السوق بخمسين.
ipa: ʔiʃtaˈreːt θaˈlaːθ simˈtʃaːt ˈmin asˈsuːɡ bixamˈsiːn
gloss_en: I bought three fish from the market for fifty.
notes: interdental ث retained /θ/ and kaf-affrication (simač) are node rank-1 (alshammari2026); ق→ɡ (sūg)

gloss_en: This man is looking for work.
notes: pan-Gulf rayyāl 'man'; ذ retained /ð/ in hāða is the node's fricative-first interdental (szreder_derrick2023); geminates يّ وّ

sentence: يَلَّا رُوح جِيب الْغَرَض مِن السَّيَّارَة.
raw: يلا روح جيب الغرض من السيارة.
ipa: ˈjallaː ˈruːħ ˈdʒiːb ˈalɣarɑdˤ ˈmin assajˈjaːra
gloss_en: Come on, go get the thing from the car.
notes: Gulf imperatives rūḥ/jīb; ǧīm surfaces node rank-1 /dʒ/ (Emirati yodization jīb→yīb is the documented leaf variant, szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Today it is not hot and the sky is cloudy.
notes: pan-Gulf negator mū; ta_marbuta; geminate يّ in mghayyima

gloss_en: How much is the kilo? Five and a half.
notes: bikam question frame; geminate صّ; emphatic ص

gloss_en: The appointment is at half past three in the afternoon.
notes: interdental ث retained; sun assimilation as-s; emphatic ص in ʕaṣr

gloss_en: My elder brother lives in the city.
notes: pan-Gulf axūy 'my brother'; long vowels; ذ absent here

gloss_en: Go straight ahead and then turn right.
notes: pan-Gulf sīda 'straight' + baʕdēn with node ē monophthong (szreder_derrick2023); geminate فّ; imperative

sentence: الْأَكِل كَان زَين بَسّ الشُّورْبَة كَانَت بَارْدَة.
raw: الأكل كان زين بس الشوربة كانت باردة.
ipa: ˈalʔatʃil ˈkaːn ˈzeːn ˈbass aʃˈʃuːrba ˈkaːnat ˈbaːrda
gloss_en: The food was good but the soup was cold.
notes: pan-Gulf zēn evaluation; geminate سّ (bass); sun assimilation aš-š

gloss_en: Where did you put the key? I can't find it.
notes: pan-Gulf wēn 'where'; geminate طّ; negation mā; emphatic ط

gloss_en: How many came yesterday?
notes: pan-Gulf ams 'yesterday'; kam + number question; ǧīm /dʒ/ (yā)

gloss_en: If you come early we go together.
notes: conditional iða; pan-Gulf sawa 'together'; long vowels

sentence: رِحِت أَمِس لِلسُّوق وَجِبِت سِمِچ طَازَج.
raw: رحت أمس للسوق وجبت سمچ طازج.
ipa: ˈriħit ˈʔamis lisˈsuːɡ ˈwadʒibit ˈsimitʃ ˈtˤɑːzadʒ
gloss_en: I went to the market yesterday and got fresh fish.
notes: past narrative; ق→ɡ (sūg); kaf-affrication simač (alshammari2026); ǧīm /dʒ/ in ṭāzaǧ

gloss_en: Tomorrow we travel early in the morning.
notes: pan-Gulf bāčir 'tomorrow' with kaf-affrication (szreder_derrick2023); emphatic ص; sun assimilation aṣ-ṣ

gloss_en: Hello, who is with me?
notes: phone frame; pan-Gulf minu 'who'; long vowels

gloss_en: Good morning, how are you doing?
notes: greeting pair; pan-Gulf š-axbārak 'how are you'; node ē monophthong in al-xēr (szreder_derrick2023)

gloss_en: Patience is good, man.
notes: proverb-style closing; pan-Gulf zēn + rayyāl; geminate صّ; emphatic ص
